# services.lasuite-docs

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.lasuite-docs`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.lasuite-docs.backendPackage` | `package` | The lasuite-docs package to use. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.bind` | `string` | The path, host/port or file descriptior to bind the gunicorn socket to. See <https://docs.gunicorn.org/en/stable/settings.html#bind> for possible options. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.celery.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra arguments to pass to the celery process. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.collaborationServer.package` | `package` | The lasuite-docs-collaboration-server package to use. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.collaborationServer.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port used by the collaboration server to listen. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.collaborationServer.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (string or boolean)` | Configuration options of collaboration server. See <https://github.com/suitenumerique/docs/blob/v5.2.1/docs/env.md> |
| `services.lasuite-docs.collaborationServer.settings.COLLABORATION_BACKEND_BASE_URL` | `string` | URL to the backend server base |
| `services.lasuite-docs.collaborationServer.settings.COLLABORATION_SERVER_ORIGIN` | `string` | Origins allowed to connect to the collaboration server |
| `services.lasuite-docs.collaborationServer.settings.PORT` | `string` | Port used by collaboration server to listen to |
| `services.lasuite-docs.domain` | `string` | Domain name of the docs instance. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable SuiteNumérique Docs. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.enableNginx` | `boolean` | Whether to enable enable and configure Nginx for reverse proxying. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to environment file. This can be useful to pass secrets to docs via tools like `agenix` or `sops`. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.frontendPackage` | `package` | The lasuite-docs-frontend package to use. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.gunicorn.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra arguments to pass to the gunicorn process. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.postgresql.createLocally` | `boolean` | Configure local PostgreSQL database server for docs. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.redis.createLocally` | `boolean` | Configure local Redis cache server for docs. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.s3Url` | `string` | URL of the S3 bucket. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.secretKeyPath` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the Django secret key. The key can be generated using: `python3 -c 'import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex())'` If not set, the secret key will be automatically generated. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (null or string or boolean or absolute path or signed integer)` | Configuration options of docs. See <https://github.com/suitenumerique/docs/blob/v5.2.1/docs/env.md> `REDIS_URL` and `CELERY_BROKER_URL` are set if `services.lasuite-docs.redis.createLocally` is true. `DB_HOST` is set if `services.lasuite-docs.postgresql.createLocally` is true. |
| `services.lasuite-docs.settings.CELERY_BROKER_URL` | `null or string` | URL of the redis backend for celery |
| `services.lasuite-docs.settings.DATA_DIR` | `absolute path` | Path to the data directory |
| `services.lasuite-docs.settings.DB_HOST` | `null or string` | Host of the database |
| `services.lasuite-docs.settings.DB_NAME` | `string` | Name of the database |
| `services.lasuite-docs.settings.DB_USER` | `string` | User of the database |
| `services.lasuite-docs.settings.DJANGO_ALLOWED_HOSTS` | `string` | Comma-separated list of hosts that are able to connect to the server |
| `services.lasuite-docs.settings.DJANGO_SECRET_KEY_FILE` | `absolute path` | The path to the file containing Django's secret key |
| `services.lasuite-docs.settings.REDIS_URL` | `null or string` | URL of the redis backend |
